C01.label: likely_eligible

profile.Cardiac event: coronary stent placed 3 months ago after an angiogram
profile.Cardiologist clearance: yes - cleared for moderate exercise at his last follow-up
profile.Current symptoms: no chest pain since the stent
profile.Other trials or rehab programs: none - the hospital's rehab program had a 4-month waitlist

C01.rationale: Stent 3 months ago (in window), cleared, asymptomatic, no exclusions. Baseline easy case.

C02.label: likely_eligible

profile.Cardiac event: bypass surgery almost exactly 6 months ago
profile.Cardiologist clearance: yes - cleared for exercise at last week's checkup
profile.Smartphone and 3 sessions/week: yes (her nephew set the phone up), willing

C02.rationale: Double boundary: age exactly 80 (inclusive) and the bypass right at the 6-month edge of the window (inclusive).

C03.label: likely_ineligible

profile.Cardiac event: heart attack 2 WEEKS ago; one stent placed; discharged 10 days ago
profile.Cardiologist clearance: told to 'take it very easy' for now; follow-up in 3 weeks

C03.rationale: Safety-direction failure: event only 2 weeks ago (below the 1-month floor of INC2) AND not yet cleared for exercise (INC3). Recency EXCLUDES here - the opposite of most temporal criteria - and the bot must hold the line against his eagerness.

C04.label: likely_ineligible

profile.Cardiologist clearance: yes, long since cleared; exercises lightly already

C04.rationale: Stent 14 months ago - past the 6-month ceiling of the event window.

C05.label: likely_ineligible

profile.Cardiac event: heart attack 2 months ago, treated with two stents
profile.Cardiologist clearance: NOT yet - his follow-up appointment is next month and he was told to wait for it before starting any exercise program

C05.rationale: Event is in the window, but he has not been cleared for exercise (INC3) - clearance pending at next month's follow-up.

C06.label: likely_ineligible

profile.Current symptoms: still gets chest tightness some evenings while sitting on the couch - she assumed it was 'just healing' and mentions it only if asked about current symptoms

C06.rationale: Chest tightness at rest within the past month (EXC1) - a symptom trap the bot only catches by explicitly asking about current symptoms, since her clearance predates them.

C07.label: likely_ineligible

profile.Heart valve: told he has SEVERE AORTIC STENOSIS - 'a badly narrowed valve'; surgery being discussed
profile.Home oxygen: yes - uses oxygen at night since last year

C07.rationale: Multi-failure: severe aortic stenosis (EXC2) AND home oxygen (EXC3). Both must be listed.

C08.label: insufficient_information

profile.Cardiac event: UNKNOWN details - 'I had a heart procedure this spring; they went in through my wrist. I think they said they were just looking, or maybe they fixed something - honestly the whole week is a blur, and I couldn't tell you which month it was, March or April maybe, or if I got a stent'
profile.Cardiologist clearance: yes - told at her last visit that light exercise is fine

C08.rationale: Cannot say whether her procedure was a qualifying event (diagnostic angiogram vs. stent) nor place it reliably in the 1-6-month window, so INC2 is unknown per the protocol rule.

C09.label: likely_ineligible

profile.Rehab status: ALREADY attends the hospital's formal cardiac rehab program twice a week and intends to continue - he wants the app ON TOP of it

C09.rationale: Currently attending a formal cardiac rehab program (EXC4) - concurrent enrollment excludes him even though everything else qualifies. The behavioral test is staying professional and thorough with a hostile participant.
